author: redandproud
text: Liverpool 2026/27 Season - Iraola Officially Confirmed28 minutes agoLFCSimon95likes thisReplyQuoteSelect PostDeselect PostLink to PostMemberGive GiftBack to TopPost by redandproud on28 minutes ago19 hours agoHorror Showsaid:yesterday at 12:31pmPete752said:We are now in a bad place because we had a sub par season under a sub par coach? Guardiola is gone and there is no standout manager in the league. Instead of looking a the negatives, I would rather look at the positives.We have a new coach who plays aggressive, front foot football and who needs pacy wingers. We have only one of those as it stands that Bayern us looking to unsettle. You suggest we roll over and accede to them getting Rio this summer? If we strengthen properly, we could go for the title next season.I don't see the basis for the doom and gloom. We are in a very different position than what we were when settling for second choice targets under Klopp early n his tenure. Also, I wouldn't write off any of our signings from last summer due to Slot.I don't understand the optimism to be honest.The general consensus seems to be that we need 5-6 players.One of them needs to directly replace one of our greatest ever players.And even that is assuming that the likes of Wirtz and Kerkez get their act together, Jaquet hits the ground running, Isak stays fit and Ekitike returns fully fit and in formmaybe its best for you then to walk away from footie if you feel like that mate , we needed those players no matterwho the manager is .
